content_blocks.text:
## 9. Capacity Building and Training

In accordance with Paragraph 3.7 of the 2026 FIU-IND Guidelines, the Company shall undertake capacity building of its personnel covering: (i) screening at the recruitment stage; (ii) ongoing AML/CFT/CPF training; (iii) instruction manuals for operational procedures; and (iv) role-specific training customisation.

(e) **Principal Officer continuing professional development:** Given the Company's current compliance staffing, the Principal Officer shall undertake at least one external AML/CFT/CPF training programme per calendar year (industry conference, regulatory certification, or specialised course), to supplement in-house knowledge and stay current with emerging risks and typologies.

(e) **Function-specific training:** Enhanced training for personnel in AML/CFT/CPF functions, including the AML compliance team, transaction monitoring team, sanctions screening team, and any personnel directly involved in STR drafting and filing. Function-specific training shall be conducted at least twice annually and shall cover emerging typologies, red-flag indicators, and regulatory updates relevant to the specific function.
Attendance, content, and assessment outcomes of all training sessions shall be documented and retained in accordance with Section 16 of this Policy.
